query: SELECT COUNT(*) as totale_en, section FROM news_items WHERE createdAt > DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 48 HOUR) AND (title REGEXP '\\b(Raises|Secures|Launches|Announces|Unveils|Backs|Cancels|Improves|Warns|Aims|Signals|Breaks|Faces|Headwinds|Transform|Agents|Will|How|Could|Would|Should|Deter|Computing|Talent|Defense|Tech|Physicians|Find|Powered|Side|Gigs|Agricultural|Funding)\\b') GROUP BY section ORDER BY totale_en DESC
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3aGZ9MSLrhgSbtV.0a4dfe1f8b2a --database UyPaon6i3Ec4nvfPz6kUfg --execute SELECT COUNT(*) as totale_en, section FROM news_items WHERE createdAt > DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 48 HOUR) AND (title REGEXP '\\b(Raises|Secures|Launches|Announces|Unveils|Backs|Cancels|Improves|Warns|Aims|Signals|Breaks|Faces|Headwinds|Transform|Agents|Will|How|Could|Would|Should|Deter|Computing|Talent|Defense|Tech|Physicians|Find|Powered|Side|Gigs|Agricultural|Funding)\\b') GROUP BY section ORDER BY totale_en DESC
